Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class ActivityWithdrawal

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.ActivityWithdrawal
public class ActivityWithdrawal extends Object
ActivityWithdrawal

Used to record withdrawals of funds from an account and capture details related to the withdrawal

    additionalInstructions()

    Optional<Boolean>
    closingAccount()
    Indicates whether this withdrawal is intended to fully deplete and close an account
    Optional<Boolean>
    conversion()
    Indicates whether this transaction is converting a retirement account to a ROTH IRA
    Optional<String>
    destinationAccountNumber()
    Human readable account identifier for the account the assets were journaled.
    Optional<String>
    destinationInstitution()
    Name of the firm which was the destination of funds out of the account
    Optional<ActivityDistributionType>
    distributionType()
    Categorizes the withdrawal to indicate whether special handling of the transaction is needed elsewhere
    Optional<Integer>
    distributionYear()
    The tax year the withdrawal should be applied to (YYYY)

    equals(Object o)
     
    Optional<String>
    fedReferenceNumber()
    Unique tracking number provided to allow tracking a wire transfer from the initiating bank to the receiving bank

    Indicates whether the transaction is for a futures related transaction

    micro()
    Indicates whether this transaction is a micro withdrawal to validate ACH Relationships

    Name of the firm which was the source of funds into the account

    Indicates whether the transaction is a scheduled periodic withdrawal

    The type of retirement account the withdrawal is being made from
    Optional<Boolean>
    taxable()
    Indicates whether the transaction is taxable
    String
    toString()
     
    Optional<Boolean>
    totalDistribution()
    Indicates whether or a not a distribution is a full liquidation of a tax-advantaged account

    type()
    The mechanism by which the funds will be withdrawn

    • additionalInstructions

      public Optional<String> additionalInstructions()
      Free form text for additional sweep messages or instructions

    • advance

      public Optional<Boolean> advance()
      indicates whether the withdrawal is a cash advance

    • closingAccount

      public Optional<Boolean> closingAccount()
      Indicates whether this withdrawal is intended to fully deplete and close an account

    • conversion

      public Optional<Boolean> conversion()
      Indicates whether this transaction is converting a retirement account to a ROTH IRA

    • destinationAccountNumber

      public Optional<String> destinationAccountNumber()
      Human readable account identifier for the account the assets were journaled. To be populated when the Withdrawal type is Journal

    • destinationInstitution

      public Optional<String> destinationInstitution()
      Name of the firm which was the destination of funds out of the account

    • distributionType

      public Optional<ActivityDistributionType> distributionType()
      Categorizes the withdrawal to indicate whether special handling of the transaction is needed elsewhere

    • distributionYear

      public Optional<Integer> distributionYear()
      The tax year the withdrawal should be applied to (YYYY)

    • fedReferenceNumber

      public Optional<String> fedReferenceNumber()
      Unique tracking number provided to allow tracking a wire transfer from the initiating bank to the receiving bank

    • futuresSettlement

      public Optional<Boolean> futuresSettlement()
      Indicates whether the transaction is for a futures related transaction

    • micro

      public Optional<Boolean> micro()
      Indicates whether this transaction is a micro withdrawal to validate ACH Relationships

    • originatingInstitution

      public Optional<String> originatingInstitution()
      Name of the firm which was the source of funds into the account

    • periodic

      public Optional<Boolean> periodic()
      Indicates whether the transaction is a scheduled periodic withdrawal

      public Optional<ActivityRetirementType> retirementType()
      The type of retirement account the withdrawal is being made from

      public Optional<Boolean> taxable()
      Indicates whether the transaction is taxable

      public Optional<Boolean> totalDistribution()
      Indicates whether or a not a distribution is a full liquidation of a tax-advantaged account

      The mechanism by which the funds will be withdrawn
